Yue Song жЁ‚жќѕ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yue Song (жЁ‚жќѕ). A possible eunuch, he warned against Zhang Jue and defend his critic Yang Ci. Yue Song was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
